SEARCH
Module overrungl.opengl
Package overrungl.opengl

Interface GLLoadFunc

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface GLLoadFunc
The OpenGL loading function.

Example

// loads OpenGL forward-compatible profile
import java.util.Objects;
Objects.requireNonNull(GLLoader.load(GLLoader.loadFlags(glfw::getProcAddress)), "Failed to load OpenGL");
Since:
0.1.0
Author:
squid233

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    MemorySegment
    invoke(String string)
    Gets the function pointer of the given GL function.

    Returns a symbol lookup of this.
    static GLLoadFunc
    withAlias(GLLoadFunc load)
    Returns a loading function with alias supports.

  • Method Details

    • invoke

      MemorySegment invoke(String string)
      Gets the function pointer of the given GL function.
      Parameters:
      string - the name of the function.
      Returns:
      the function pointer.

    • lookup

      default SymbolLookup lookup()
      Returns a symbol lookup of this.
      Returns:
      a symbol lookup of this

    • withAlias

      static GLLoadFunc withAlias(GLLoadFunc load)
      Returns a loading function with alias supports.
      Parameters:
      load - the original loading function
      Returns:
      a loading function with alias supports
